title: Richly Roasted Portuguese Custard Tart
description: A sweet and crumbly Portuguese dessert featuring a rich custard filling, roasted to perfection in a robata grill, this dish is a unique and adventurous treat for anyone looking to try something new, and it is low in sodium to accommodate health conscious eaters.
instructions: Preheat the robata grill to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour, sugar, and salt.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, melted butter, milk, and vanilla extract.
Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and whisk until smooth.
Pour the mixture into 6 small tart cups.
Place the tart cups in a large sous vide container and add water to come halfway up the sides of the cups.
Seal the container and cook in the robata grill for 25 minutes.
Remove the tarts from the grill and let cool to room temperature.
Serve the tarts chilled, garnished with a sprinkle of sugar.
